Event: Tavern of Fortune - October 2025
Event Date: 23/10/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AR332
Silent Shadow Outfit

The unit's spell power is increased by 50% for the duration of the battle.

Once in a while, the unit removes all shields and damage-reducing effects from 3 random enemy units. The unit also applies shields with the value equal to 100% of the armor wearer's spell power to self and all allied units. Shields block damage of any type and exist for up to 5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Tavern of Fortune - October 2025

Event date: 23/10/2025

Sage bot code: AR332

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
